student.name: Aarav
student.context: NEET dropper, second attempt. Lives in a coaching hostel in Kota. Strong in Biology, struggles with Physical Chemistry. Weekly full-length mock tests are scheduled on Sunday mornings.

entries.text: Decent start to the week. Revised the cardiovascular system in the morning and it actually stuck this time. I like Bio, it makes sense to me. Did a 90-question Botany set in the evening and got most of them right. Feeling okay about where I am.

Long day. Pushed hard on physical chemistry, thermodynamics. It is the one topic that wont click no matter what. Got a bit frustrated in the afternoon but pulled it back. Tomorrow I will do a Bio-heavy day to balance it out.
Tried to take it easy before the mock tomorrow. Light revision, formula sheets. Couldnt really relax though, kept thinking about the test. Went to bed but couldnt fall asleep for ages.

Mock today. Its fine. Score dropped from last week. Everyone in the batch is moving ahead and Im stuck. I always lose marks in the chemistry section, always. Dont know why I bother some days. Whatever, did 11 hours after to make up for it. Im fine.

Felt better after proper sleep. Organic chemistry mechanisms in the morning, got through the aldol stuff. Lunch with the guys, nice to laugh a bit. The Sunday thing faded. Two hours of physics daily and Ill be okay.
Good day. Bio all morning, genetics, love this chapter. Confidence came back a bit. Called home in the evening, Amma was happy I sounded good. Solid day, nothing dramatic.
Mock tomorrow again. Bit anxious. Did PYQs, mixed results, physical chem dragged me down. Stayed up later than I should finishing notes. Head is buzzing, need to sleep.

Another mock done. Same story. Im behind everyone, I always will be. The chemistry section just breaks me every single time. What is even the point of all this. Whatever. Pushed through another long evening. Its fine, its fine.
Back to normal rhythm after a proper night. Physiology set in the morning, clean run. The mock isnt everything, its one day. Will sort chemistry out slowly. Bed on time tonight.

Mock again on Sunday and I cant shake the feeling that Im letting everyone down. Appa took a loan for this coaching and I keep thinking Im just wasting their money. Some days I feel like they would be better off without this burden. I dont say any of this to them, I just smile on the calls. Tired.

Mock. Its fine. Lower again. Everyones ahead, Im always stuck in the same spot. I always wreck the chemistry section, every time without fail. Why do I even bother. Did another 11 hours to compensate. Im fine, really.
